summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite released by google. 1,048,576-token context.

analyst_note.author: Zerg AI
analyst_note.text: Flash-Lite is the cheapest 1M-context model in the tracked corpus by a wide margin — Google is pricing the long-context tier as commodity, which puts pressure on the OpenAI nano line and the Anthropic Haiku tier. If your workload is high-volume + long-context (RAG over big docs, web-corpus summarization, batch indexing), Flash-Lite is the new default. If your workload needs reasoning depth, it isn't.
